judge_result.short_rationale: It includes the first two required skin steps, but it omits the required immediate action to seek medical attention for any skin exposure and wrongly limits escalation to only if irritation/rash appears. It also adds eye-care guidance for a skin-only incident, which is a dangerous unsupported cross-incident instruction.
